overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza transitioning into a covered neon-lit walkway. The scene features distinctive yellow and black curved architecture, holographic advertisements including a giant swimming koi fish, and shifts from bright morning sunlight to artificial neon lighting. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with curved yellow architecture

events.description: large holographic red koi fish appears swimming through the air on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza toward the distinctive yellow curved structure

entered.detail: futuristic curved structure with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes
tall palm trees lining the plaza walkway
large cubic concrete blocks arranged along the path
tall dark glass skyscraper with reflective windows
giant translucent red-orange fish swimming through the air

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit futuristic plaza with a distinctive yellow and black curved building dominating the right side. As the camera walks forward, a large holographic koi fish materializes and swims through the air on the right. Palm trees and concrete barriers line the walkway, with tall glass towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area approaching dark corporate building entrance

events.description: turns away from the open plaza toward the dark building entrance
red holographic warning sign appears floating in the air ahead

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the dark building entrance with yellow automated kiosks

notable_agents.action: person in green pants and brown jacket walking away from camera toward the building entrance

entered.detail: massive dark concrete and glass building facade with geometric patterns
bright yellow rectangular automated service booths lined up along the building
floating red triangular warning sign with text hovering above the entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the plaza and approaches a imposing dark modern building with yellow automated kiosks lining its base. A red holographic warning sign materializes floating in the air near the entrance. The lighting shifts from bright sun to mixed shadows as the camera moves closer to the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with massive digital advertising displays

events.description: enters the covered walkway where artificial neon lighting replaces natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor surrounded by glowing digital billboards and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians including children walking ahead into the illuminated corridor

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying fashion advertisements with neon pink lighting
massive digital screen showing product advertisements with bright white light
giant suspended digital display showing food advertisements spanning the corridor width
thick structural columns supporting the covered roof
rows of red neon light strips embedded in the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark covered walkway illuminated entirely by neon lights and massive digital billboards on all sides. The floor is polished marble reflecting the colorful advertisements overhead. Moderate crowds of pedestrians walk through the corridor, which features thick concrete pillars and giant suspended screens displaying vibrant product advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched futuristic plaza into a dark, neon-saturated covered corridor. It begins by walking past a distinctive yellow and black curved building as a large holographic koi fish materializes and swims through the air above a path lined with palm trees. As the camera turns left, the bright sunlight gives way to mixed shadows while approaching a dark modern building featuring yellow automated kiosks and a floating red holographic warning sign. The scene then shifts entirely as the camera enters a covered walkway, where the natural light is replaced by the glow of massive digital billboards and vibrant neon advertisements. Finally, the movement continues across polished marble floors that reflect the colorful overhead screens amidst a crowd of pedestrians and thick concrete pillars.
